title: Our Services
subtitle: Comprehensive technology solutions for your business

services.name: Custom Software Development
services.shortDescription: Tailored software solutions built to solve your specific business challenges.
services.heroSubtitle: From concept to deployment — purpose-built software that transforms your operations
services.description: Off-the-shelf software rarely fits perfectly. OBH builds custom applications tailored to your workflows, your industry and your long-term goals. We combine design thinking with modern engineering to create software that's intuitive, scalable and built to last.

features.title: Discovery & Strategy
features.description: We identify pain points, choose the right tech stack and define the project scope to align with your business goals

features.title: Design & Prototyping
features.description: Wireframing, UI/UX design and interactive prototyping with stakeholder feedback at every stage

features.title: Agile Development & Testing
features.description: Iterative development with regular sprint demos, rigorous QA and continuous integration

features.title: Deployment & Optimisation
features.description: Seamless deployment, staff training, onboarding and ongoing support to ensure long-term success

benefits: Solutions tailored to your workflows and long-term goals
Performance, security and scalability using modern frameworks
Seamless user experience and system integration
OBH as a strategic partner for long-term success

services.name: Business Process Automation
services.shortDescription: Streamline operations and eliminate manual bottlenecks with intelligent automation.
services.heroSubtitle: Eliminate repetitive tasks and unlock efficiency with smart automation solutions
services.description: Manual processes waste time, introduce errors and hold back growth. OBH analyses your workflows, identifies automation opportunities and implements smart solutions using AI, RPA and API integrations — transforming how your business operates.

features.title: Analysis & Strategy
features.description: Auditing processes, mapping automation opportunities and selecting the right technologies (AI, RPA, APIs)

features.title: Design & Prototyping
features.description: Process modelling, prototyping and user testing to create efficient, intuitive workflows

features.title: Development & Integration
features.description: Building automation tools, integrating with existing CRM, ERP and cloud systems with full security and compliance

features.title: Deployment & Optimisation
features.description: Implementing automation with minimal disruption, training staff and continuously refining processes

benefits: Focus on efficiency and sustainable growth
Seamless integration with existing CRM, ERP and cloud systems
Scalable and secure solutions built for evolving needs

services.name: Web Design & Development
services.shortDescription: High-performance, SEO-optimised websites that elevate your brand.
services.heroSubtitle: Beautiful, high-performance websites that drive results and elevate your brand
services.description: Your website is your digital storefront. OBH creates custom, brand-focused websites that are fast, secure, mobile-first and optimised for search engines. We don't use templates — every site is designed and built from scratch to reflect your brand and achieve your goals.

features.title: Strategy & Planning
features.description: Discovery sessions, competitor research and site-structure definition to align with your business goals

features.title: Design & Prototyping
features.description: Custom UI/UX design, wireframing and mobile-first prototypes that bring your brand to life

features.title: Development & Testing
features.description: Frontend and backend development, integrations and rigorous testing for speed, security and cross-device compatibility

features.title: Launch & Growth
features.description: SEO optimisation, speed and security enhancements, deployment and ongoing maintenance to keep you growing

benefits: End-to-end support and analytics to refine your strategy
